wen         2010-05-05 06:45:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/hs-bsd-sysctl  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module provides efficient access to the BSD sysctl(3) interface
  via the Haskell FFI.
  
  WWW: http://hackage.haskell.org/package/bsd-sysctl
  
  PR:             ports/146293
  Submitted by:   Ju Pengfei <jupengfei@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3911    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/hs-bsd-sysctl/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/hs-bsd-sysctl/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/devel/hs-bsd-sysctl/pkg-plist (new)
